tasks.name: relocate-agent
tasks.task:
source_report: ~/docs/knowledge-review-agent.md
knowledge_dir: knowledge/agent

Read the Relocation Suggestions section of source_report. If there are no suggestions, stop — nothing to do.

For each suggested relocation: move the file with `mv <source> <target>`. Create the target directory first with `mkdir -p` if it does not exist.

tasks.name: relocate-commit
tasks.task: Run `git status` to see what was moved. Stage all changes in knowledge/ with `git add knowledge/` and commit with a conventional commit message (e.g. `refactor(knowledge): relocate misplaced entries per audit`). If there is nothing to commit, stop.
